markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync on content strategy, performance, and operational updates.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**LLM traffic is softening,** driven by declines from ChatGPT and Perplexity. GrowthX will diagnose the cause (e.g., low-value pages) and report back next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [**Content refresh strategy is on hold** pending internal SentinelOne review. GrowthX will build the technical pipeline in parallel to avoid delays.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [**The 2024–25 CVE expansion list is being revised** by a technical SEO expert to correct for missing SEMrush search volume data, ensuring the new list is comprehensive.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [**Check That tool access is blocked** by a known bug preventing login. GrowthX is escalating the issue to its tech team for a fix.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Diagnostics

  - [**CS101 Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [Non-branded search position improved from 22 → 12.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [Impressions and engagement are scaling; top pages show 65–80% engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [**LLM Referral Traffic Softening:**](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
      - [**Problem:** Referral traffic from ChatGPT and Perplexity has declined over the last two weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
      - [**GrowthX Diagnostic Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
          - [Cross-reference citation data with referral data to identify which pages are losing traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
          - [Analyze CVE pages' specific impact on LLM referrals.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
          - [Review tracked prompts to ensure they accurately reflect SentinelOne's target audience.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
      - [**SentinelOne Request:** Identify the specific directory (CS101 vs. CVE) and pages losing traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)

### Content Strategy & Pipeline

  - [**Content Refresh Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
      - [**GrowthX Proposal:** A separate pipeline to improve existing content.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
          - [**Goal:** Boost ranking for articles stuck on pages 2–3.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
          - [**Method:** Update and deepen context while preserving current rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
          - [**Process:** Calibrate the approach with a 2-article test.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
      - [**Decision:** On hold for internal SentinelOne review (Mansi, Karthi, Ankit).](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [**2024–25 CVE Expansion List:**](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
      - [**Problem:** SEMrush data was missing search volume, creating an incomplete list.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
      - [**Solution:** A technical SEO expert is revising the list to ensure it is comprehensive.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
      - [**Action:** Execution on the new list will begin next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [**CS101 Content Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
      - [**Status:** Healthy backlog of \~30 topics in production.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
      - [**Action:** SentinelOne to review keyword recommendations for future planning.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [**Threat Actor Database:**](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX to share competitor examples ("comps") on Slack today.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
      - [**Decision:** SentinelOne to discuss the project's internal appetite after reviewing the comps.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)

### Tooling & Admin

  - [**Check That Tool Access:**](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
      - [**Problem:** Karthi was blocked by a known bug ("couldn't find your account") during login.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX to escalate the issue to its tech team for a fix.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
      - [**Access Request:** Mahendra also requires access.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [**GA4 Event Mapping:**](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [**Need:** A full mapping of GA4 events is required to interpret data from the new custom report.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [**Action:** Ankit (SentinelOne) will provide the mapping.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
      - [Share Threat Actor Database comps on Slack (today).](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
      - [Escalate Check That login bug to tech team.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
      - [Add Mahendra to Check That.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
      - [Diagnose LLM traffic decline and report findings next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [**SentinelOne:**](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [Review content refresh strategy internally and provide feedback by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [Review CS101 keyword recommendations.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
      - [Provide the full GA4 event mapping.](https://fathom.video/share/Sr7X6EdveZ7ecjnfnxdAiJTWzwvWgorr?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
